/opt/cray/pe/craype/2.7.34/bin/CC -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -fopenmp -shared -Wl,-soname,libprofile_util.so -o libprofile_util.so CMakeFiles/profile_util.dir/__/git_revision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/profile_util.dir/mem_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/profile_util.dir/thread_affinity_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/profile_util.dir/time_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/profile_util.dir/profile_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/profile_util.dir/profile_util_cinterface.cpp.o   -L/software/setonix/2025.08/software/linux-sles15-zen3/gcc-14.2.0/gmp-6.3.0-r3id365ebxxxdbfh2ekw2msjuiwagsur/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/software/setonix/2025.08/software/linux-sles15-zen3/gcc-14.2.0/gmp-6.3.0-r3id365ebxxxdbfh2ekw2msjuiwagsur/lib: /software/setonix/2025.08/software/linux-sles15-zen3/gcc-14.2.0/hdf5-1.14.3-4yukquu2yi4fjjfzchegq6n63ezios5g/lib/libhdf5.so /software/setonix/2025.08/software/linux-sles15-zen3/gcc-14.2.0/gsl-2.8-tmgqxaux6gonrtq6czrijv3y5hz3kqx7/lib64/libgsl.so /software/setonix/2025.08/software/linux-sles15-zen3/gcc-14.2.0/gsl-2.8-tmgqxaux6gonrtq6czrijv3y5hz3kqx7/lib64/libgslcblas.so -lm -lgmp
